mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, status, owner, description FROM projects ORDER BY id
INSERT INTO projects (code, name, status, owner, description) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{status}, #{owner}, #{description}) RETURNING id, code, name, status, owner, description

UPDATE projects SET code = #{request.code}, name = #{request.name}, status = #{request.status}, owner = #{request.owner}, description = #{request.description} WHERE id = #{id} RETURNING id, code, name, status, owner, description
